meta.title: Services | SGS
meta.description: SGS services across renewable energy consulting, solar advisory, water and wastewater, desalination, EPC coordination, O&M support, and procurement partnerships.

hero.title: Services built around your project goals.
hero.text: From strategy to implementation planning, we support each stage with clear, practical advisory.

service_panels.title: Renewable Energy Consulting & Project Development
service_panels.text: Feasibility, planning, structuring, and development support for solar and clean infrastructure projects.

service_panels.title: Solar Infrastructure Advisory
service_panels.text: Support for utility-scale solar, rooftop systems, and broader clean power integration.

service_panels.title: Water & Wastewater Solutions
service_panels.text: Advisory for treatment, recycling, purification, and utility infrastructure systems.

service_panels.title: Desalination & Reverse Osmosis Advisory
service_panels.text: Technical support for RO plants, desalination systems, and water production strategy.

service_panels.title: EPC Coordination
service_panels.text: Interface support between engineering, procurement, construction, and specialist technologies.

service_panels.title: Operations & Maintenance Support
service_panels.text: Operational planning for continuity, service quality, and lifecycle performance.

service_panels.title: JV / Consortium / PPP Facilitation
service_panels.text: Support for fit-for-purpose partnerships in complex infrastructure programs.

service_panels.title: Procurement & Vendor Management
service_panels.text: Cross-border supplier, subcontractor, and vendor coordination for specialized delivery scopes.

cta.title: Define the right scope for your next project.
